THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-0.c: You stand above the sun, yet you don't know where the light falls.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-1.a: So what? The destination of light was never the question. What matters is—how long are you willing to burn for it.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-2.c: ...I'm not afraid of burning. I'm afraid that after it all burns away, nothing will be left.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-3.a: Then don't let it burn away. You came here to prove that this flame is worth burning forever, didn't you?
You return again. The Sun God's blessing still shines upon you... yet every time you stand here, it means you still haven't found the answer.
Maybe there is no answer. But every time I climb up here, I get closer to the light.
Closer to the light... yet not burned by it. Interesting. Go on, try again.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-0.a: Child of the Sun... do you think that beneath the blazing sun, you can see everything clearly?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-1.c: I can't see everything. But I can see clearly— you're standing between me and the sun.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-2.a: Then go around me. Or— reduce me to ashes.
NEOW.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-0.char: Your light... awakened me from the darkness.
NEOW.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-1.char: I choose to keep moving forward. Even if there's no light ahead.
DARV.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-0.char: Hey! You're so warm! Just like the sun!
DARV.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-1.ancient: Child of the Sun! Come pick a forgotten gem! Maybe it can light your way through the Spire!
DARV.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.1-0r.ancient: Still carrying that warmth! There's something for you in that pile, take your pick!
DARV.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-0.ancient: This gem... it glows. Just like you.
DARV.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-1.char: It doesn't glow on its own. It just reflects the sun.
DARV.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-2.ancient: Then become the sun! Don't just be a reflecting stone!
OROBAS.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-0.char: You smell like lightning! Different from mine, but very bright!
OROBAS.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-1.ancient: BRIGHT!! Very bright!! Take this! Go light up all the darkness in the Spire!!!
OROBAS.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.1-0r.ancient: The Sun Child is back!! Take something and fight!! Don't let the light dim!!
OROBAS.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-0.ancient: Will the sun go out?? It won't, right?? You won't let it go out, right!?
OROBAS.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-1.char: ...I'm not sure. But I'm sure I'll always try not to let it.
OROBAS.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-2.ancient: That's enough!! That's enough!! Take it, my blessing plus the sun's blessing equals a SUPER blessing!!
NONUPEIPE.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-0.char: Oh? The Sun's favorite? Your radiance is truly... enviable.
NONUPEIPE.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-1.ancie: Don't be shy. Let me add a touch of elegance to you— even the sun would be jealous.
NONUPEIPE.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.1-0r.anci: Still as dazzling as ever. Come, accept my blessing once more, let the light become even more perfect.
NONUPEIPE.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-0.ancie: You know... when light is too bright, you can't see anything at all. Let me add a soft touch of color for you.
NONUPEIPE.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-1.char: ...I don't need to look better. I just need to not be swallowed by darkness.
NONUPEIPE.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-2.ancie: Fine then. But keep this radiance with you— just in case one day the sun isn't there, you'll still have something to light your way.
PAEL.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-0.char: Your light... feels especially warm in the tides.
PAEL.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-1.ancient: [thinky_dots]Warm child... seeking light in deep waters... take it... a piece of my tranquility...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.1-0r.ancient: [thinky_dots]Light and water... both flow through you... rest a while... then continue onward...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-0.ancient: [thinky_dots]The sun doesn't dive beneath the water... but you can... carrying light into any depth...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-1.char: Thank you. I'll carry this peace as I keep climbing.
PAEL.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-2.ancient: [thinky_dots]Go... let the water's surface refract your light... so everyone can see...[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-0.char: The Sun God's blessing? So what! Come fight!
TANX.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-1.ancient: [b]Blessings don't matter! What matters is whether you're strong enough! Take this weapon! Go prove your light isn't just for show!![/b]
TANX.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.1-0r.ancient: [b]The Sun Child returns! This time be stronger! Faster! Brighter!![/b]
TANX.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-0.ancient: [b]You fought your way all the way up! Good! But not enough! Stronger enemies await at the top of the Spire![/b]
TANX.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-1.char: I don't need to be stronger. I just need to— get back up every time I fall.
TANX.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-2.ancient: [b]That's a kind of strength too!! Take it! Use this power to keep standing!![/b]
TEZCATARA.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-0.char: Your fire... is different from mine. But just as warm.
TEZCATARA.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-1.ancie: Come, let the [jitter][b]warmth[/b][/jitter] surround you. The Sun's child can surely find a sense of belonging here.
TEZCATARA.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.1-0r.anci: Still looking like you're not afraid of [jitter][b]burns[/b][/jitter]! Come sit, let the flames wash away your weariness.
TEZCATARA.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-0.ancie: You know... the sun will eventually [jitter][b]set[/b][/jitter]. But before that, would you like to try some pastries baked with the afterglow?
TEZCATARA.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-1.char: The sun sets so it can rise again. I never worry about the dark.
TEZCATARA.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-2.ancie: Well said. Then carry on with this [jitter][b]never-extinguishing[/b][/jitter] conviction.
VAKUU.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-0.char: Demon... aren't you afraid of the sun's light?
VAKUU.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.0-1.ancient: The sun's light... [sine]is still light[/sine]. At the boundary of light and dark, you can always find the best bargains.
VAKUU.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.1-0r.ancient: How much [sine]light[/sine] have you accumulated? Why not trade it for something more useful.
VAKUU.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-0.ancient: Sign this contract... and I guarantee the sun will [sine]never set[/sine].
VAKUU.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-1.char: ...The sun doesn't need anyone's guarantee about whether it sets or not. Neither do I.
VAKUU.talk.MINORIS-MINORIS.2-2.ancient: Wise choice. Take this— a [sine]free[/sine] gift, as my respect for your courage.
